rules.name: block-npm-global-install
rules.reason: Global npm installs can cause version conflicts. Use npx or a local install.

rules.name: block-npm-global-i
rules.reason: Global npm installs can cause version conflicts. Use npx or a local install.

rules.name: block-pnpm-global-add
rules.reason: Global pnpm installs can cause version conflicts. Use pnpm dlx or a local install.

rules.name: block-pnpm-global-install
rules.reason: Global pnpm installs can cause version conflicts. Use pnpm dlx or a local install.

rules.name: block-pnpm-global-subcommand
rules.reason: Global pnpm commands can cause version conflicts. Use pnpm dlx or a local install.

rules.name: block-bun-global-add
rules.reason: Global bun installs can cause version conflicts. Use bunx or a local install.

rules.name: block-bun-global-install
rules.reason: Global bun installs can cause version conflicts. Use bunx or a local install.

rules.name: block-gh-pr-merge
rules.reason: Merging pull requests from the terminal is irreversible enough to require an explicit manual decision.
